name: Kairuide Holding Co., Ltd.
summary: Kairuide Holding Co., Ltd. produces and distributes textile products. It provides fabric and yarn products, including loom stare, yarn-dyed and cotton fabrics, and others. The company was formerly known as Shandong Demian Incorporated Company and changed its name to Kairuide Holding Co., Ltd. in November 2014. Kairuide Holding Co., Ltd. was founded in 1958 and is based in Dezhou, China.
